symbols.name: BuildPipeline
symbols.doc: Automated build and certification pipeline for HDS components.
methods: validate(): Run pre-build validation: syntax check + tests.
package_pyinstaller(): Package with PyInstaller (creates standalone executable).
package_zipapp(): Package as a Python zipapp (.pyz) — no external tools needed.
package_zip(): Create a simple ZIP distribution.
sign_macos(): Sign macOS app with codesign + optional notarization.
sign_windows(): Sign Windows EXE with signtool.
create_dmg(): Create macOS DMG disk image.
run(): Run the full build pipeline.

symbols.name: CanaryResult
symbols.doc: Result of a single canary test.

symbols.name: CanaryTestRunner
symbols.doc: Runs canary tests and tracks results over time.
methods: run_canary(): Run a specific canary test.
run_random_canary(): Run a random canary test. Good for embedding between real tasks.
run_all_canaries(): Run all canary tests. Mini-diagnostic.
get_health(): Get overall model health from canary results.
save_log(): Save canary results to file.

symbols.name: TaskSpec
symbols.doc: A task specification for the conductor.

symbols.name: Conductor
symbols.doc: Orchestrates task execution using a SINGLE model with different protocol contexts.
methods: estimate_complexity(): Estimate task complexity from description (1-10).
assign_protocol_size(): Determine which protocol size context to use for a task.
add_task(): Add a task to the queue.
get_execution_order(): Sort tasks by dependencies and complexity (high first).
build_task_prompt(): Build the full prompt for executing a task with appropriate protocol context.
execute_task(): Execute a single task using the AI with appropriate protocol context.
execute_all(): Execute all queued tasks in dependency order.

symbols.name: ModelCost
methods: cost_score(): Lower is cheaper. Combines RAM + speed penalty.

symbols.name: CostRouter
symbols.doc: Routes tasks to the cheapest model that can handle them.
methods: minimum_size_for_complexity(): Determine minimum protocol size needed for given complexity.
recommend(): Recommend the cheapest model that can handle the task.
get_routing_table(): Generate a full routing table showing which model handles which complexity.
get_savings_report(): Calculate potential savings from cost routing vs always using the biggest model.

symbols.name: QualitySnapshot
symbols.doc: A snapshot of model quality at a point in time.

symbols.doc: Monitors model quality over a session.
methods: current_quality(): Average quality over recent window.
is_degrading(): Check if model quality has dropped below threshold from baseline.
get_recommendation(): Get recommendation based on current degradation state.
